user.title: Select OBD2 BLE Device
user.description: Please select your OBD-II Bluetooth device from the discovered list below.

service.title: Select GATT Service
service.description: Select the communication service exposed by your OBD-II device adapter.

characteristic.title: Configure Characteristics
characteristic.description: Choose the precise read and write characteristic channels to establish the serial connection link.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Connection
reconfigure.description: Adjust the Bluetooth configuration or serial channels for your existing hardware connection profile.

abort.not_supported: The discovered Bluetooth advertisement data pattern is not supported by this integration.
abort.no_unconfigured_devices: No unconfigured OBD2 BLE devices found on your Bluetooth network.

error.missing_unique_id: Critical connection error: The configuration entry lacks a valid unique Bluetooth MAC address identifier.
error.device_not_found: Could not establish an over-the-air link to the device with MAC address {mac}. Verify it is powered and in range.

init.title: OBD2 Configuration Menu
init.description: Please select which subsystem of your OBD-II integration profile you want to adjust.

polling.title: Polling Interval Tuning
polling.description: Adjust the database caching behavior and target polling intervals based on active vehicular telemetric states.

data.cached_values: Cache data structures in-memory to prevent duplicate bus queries

protocol.title: Force Connection Protocol
protocol.description: If your vehicle network times out on default connection setups, select a hardcoded OBD-II target standard framework below.

commands.title: Select Tracked OBD2 Commands
commands.description: Select which PIDs and OBD-II standard PID monitoring hex parameters this integration instance should actively poll from your car.
